entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns that pose challenges to agriculture

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Variations in the mean state and other statistics of the climate on all spatial and temporal scales

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Climate-dependent activity involving crop cultivation and farming

entities.name: SEMIARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and irregular rainfall where populations depend on agriculture

entities.name: ADAPTATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Actions and plans formulated to reduce sensitivity and minimize climate-related shocks

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: A semiarid state in India subject to climate change and vulnerability

entities.name: EXTREME WEATHER EVENTS
entities.description: Severe weather occurrences such as prolonged dry spells

entities.name: PROLONGED DRY SPELLS
entities.description: Extended periods of time without rainfall

entities.name: CLIMATIC VULNERABILITY ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of identifying vulnerable locations based on climatic elements and projections

entities.name: CLIMATE EXPOSURE INDEX
entities.description: A scoring system used to determine the sensitivity of districts to climate exposure

entities.name: VULNERABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A scoring system used to identify extremely vulnerable districts

entities.name: JOGULAMBA-GADWAL
entities.description: A district in Telangana found to be most sensitive according to climate exposure index scores
